data.title: Zero Trust
data.description: Security model ensuring all access requires identity verification.
data.technical_spec: BeyondCorp framework implementing Zero Trust principles.

data.title: Encryption
data.description: Data encryption at rest and in transit to ensure privacy.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 for storage and TLS/SSL for data in transit.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Defense systems against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Google Cloud Armor and Cloud CDN.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: Continuous monitoring and alert mechanisms for threats.
data.technical_spec: Security Command Center integrating threat intelligence.

data.title: Access Management
data.description: Granular access control using advanced authentication methods.
